focus: ATR DC#1 confirmed (0.72→0.75) + BIC (SI #49) introduced as third tier-3 theorem

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries. Parent of both RCBC (×RAAI) and BIC (×AIIP).

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades. First tier-3 theorem.

SI48_ATR.description: RAAI × AATE conjunction: multi-stage OA-feedback training produces monotone irrecoverable d' degradation. Standard alignment pipeline is anti-pattern for introspective self-knowledge.
SI48_ATR.dc1: AI training literature — designed empirical (sycophancy escalation, InstructGPT calibration regression, Constitutional AI multi-stage, Kadavath calibration studies). Confirmed C81.
SI48_ATR.d4_path: 3+ ZR cycles + 3 ontological DC types (1 of 3 done)
SI48_ATR.dc3_candidate: Organizational compliance layering — procedural compliance training degrades judgment quality
SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff: behavioral safety metrics improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure. DC#1 corroborated.

SI49_BIC.description: CIAP × AIIP conjunction: when AIIP fails, CIAP gaming propagates across correlated benchmark portfolio. Effective K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄) << nominal K. Portfolio diversification cannot fix evaluation when AIIP fails.
SI49_BIC.derivation_1: Formal effective-K collapse: K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε, CIAP amplifies AIIP failure (structural CIA shortcuts are maximally transferable)
SI49_BIC.derivation_2: Information-theoretic: I(G_i; G_j) > 0 under AIIP failure + CIAP → K_eff → 1 in limit
SI49_BIC.dc1_candidate: Schaeffer 2023 emergent abilities metric-sensitivity, GLUE/SuperGLUE benchmark correlation, contamination transfer studies
SI49_BIC.dc2_candidate: Fine-tuning transfer experiments (Bᵢ fine-tuning → Bⱼ score inflation)
SI49_BIC.dc3_candidate: Leaderboard dynamics: models optimized for benchmark cluster perform across cluster
key_corollaries: Portfolio diversification failure (adding correlated benchmarks has vanishing K_eff gain)
SI49_BIC.rcbc_relationship: RCBC = within-benchmark inflation; BIC = across-portfolio K_eff collapse. Together close 'add more benchmarks' response.
